name: Anna
oracleText:
Vigilance
Whenever you draw your second card each turn, scry 2.
Whenever you scry, you may gain 1 life.
flavorText: "And spake of him to all them that looked for redemption in Jerusalem." — Luke 2:38
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics, mana, colors, and stats added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "The Presentation of Jesus in the Temple" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: Prophetess of the Temple

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.creditText: James Tissot, The Presentation of Jesus in the Temple
classics.sourceNotes: Anna shares the same temple moment, so this is a strong exact-scene reuse.
